sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Research Frontiers Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results and Will Host a Conference Call at 4:30p.m. Today
feed.summary: Research Frontiers Inc. (Nasdaq: REFR) announced its third-quarter 2025 financial results, highlighting growth in its SPD-SmartGlass technology across various markets, including a new retrofit system for architectural use and increased automotive royalty income. The company remains debt-free with $1.13 million in cash and will host a conference call today at 4:30 PM ET to discuss these results and recent developments. President and CEO Joseph M. Harary noted the technology's increasing market traction and global recognition.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock: Riding The AI Hardware Wave While Valuations Get Tested
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) has become a crucial supplier to the AI and advanced chip industry, experiencing significant stock appreciation despite recent volatility. Analysts are largely constructive on the stock, with most maintaining "Buy" equivalent ratings and expecting further upside. The company's future performance hinges on AI-related capital spending, the broader semiconductor cycle, and geopolitical factors, with the market cautiously optimistic about its central role in the ecosystem.

feed.title: Verisign EVP Indelicarto sells $41,500 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Verisign's EVP, General Counsel, and Secretary, Thomas C. Indelicarto, sold 166 shares of common stock for $41,500 on January 9, 2026. This transaction occurred despite Verisign's ongoing share repurchase program and strong financial health. The company, valued at $23 billion, is scheduled to release its earnings report on February 5, 2026.

feed.title: Costco stock rises as insider sale filing hits tape; key company dates ahead for COST
feed.summary: Costco's stock rose nearly 2% after a regulatory filing showed Senior Executive Vice President Russell D. Miller sold 1,500 shares for $1.37 million. The company released strong December sales figures, and analysts like Mizuho remain upbeat, raising price targets. Upcoming key dates for investors include the annual shareholder meeting, January sales figures, and fiscal second-quarter earnings.

feed.title: Sky Quarry Establishes At-the-Market Equity Offering Program
feed.summary: Sky Quarry Inc. has established an at-the-market (ATM) equity offering program through a sales agreement with Cantor Fitzgerald & Co., allowing it to sell up to $4.7 million in common stock. This program provides the company with flexible capital-raising capacity, although it carries potential for dilution for existing shareholders. Currently, analysts rate SKYQ as a Hold with a $0.59 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assigns a "Neutral" score due to poor financial performance and weak technicals.

feed.title: FINAL DEADLINE REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Freeport-McMoran Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit with a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of January 12, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of Freeport-McMoran Inc. (NYSE: FCX) about the upcoming January 12, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline for a federal securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Freeport-McMoran made false and misleading statements by failing to disclose inadequate safety measures at its Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia, which led to worker deaths and subsequent drops in stock price. Investors affected by the alleged misrepresentations are encouraged to contact the law firm to learn more about the lawsuit and their options.

feed.title: MBX Biosciences (NASDAQ:MBX) Trading 7.6% Higher - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: MBX Biosciences (NASDAQ:MBX) saw its stock rise 7.6% on Monday, trading on light volume. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $47.22, and both the CEO and a director recently purchased shares. MBX also reported an earnings beat in its last quarter.

feed.title: UBS Maintains 'Buy' Rating for Albemarle (ALB), Increases Price Target | ALB Stock News
feed.summary: UBS has reaffirmed its 'Buy' rating for Albemarle (ALB) and increased its price target to $205 from $185, signaling strong confidence in the company's future performance. This adjustment follows similar positive revisions from other analysts, highlighting Albemarle's strategic market position as a leading lithium producer. Despite an average target price from 23 analysts suggesting a potential downside, the consensus brokerage recommendation for ALB remains "Outperform."

feed.title: Mosaic (MOS) Price Target Lowered by UBS to $33, Maintains Buy R
feed.summary: UBS analyst Lucas Beaumont has lowered the price target for Mosaic (MOS) to $33 from $38, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment reflects ongoing market evaluations, following similar price target reductions by other firms like Mizuho, Barclays, JP Morgan, and Goldman Sachs in recent months. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst forecast still implies an upside of 27.19% from the current price, with GuruFocus estimating an 18.51% upside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Kratos shares surge as Northrop partnership potentially brings more work to Sacramento
feed.summary: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions Inc. shares have recently soared due to analyst upgrades, a call for increased defense spending from President Trump, and a new partnership with Northrop Grumman Corp. This partnership could bring additional work to the Sacramento area. The article highlights Kratos' involvement in defense manufacturing and its low-cost cruise missile plans.

feed.title: General Dynamics’ unit wins $988 million US Navy contract By Reuters
feed.summary: General Dynamics' information technology unit has secured a $988 million contract from the U.S. Navy to modernize its fleet systems. The contract aims to upgrade command, control, and surveillance technologies and enhance the readiness of naval forces, including guided missile ships, aircraft carriers, and Coast Guard vessels. The initial base period is one year, with options for extensions.

feed.title: F5, Inc. (FFIV) Cybersecurity Incident-Related Securities Class Action Pending As Adverse Financial Impact Clarified - Hagens Berman
feed.summary: A securities class action lawsuit is pending against F5, Inc. (FFIV) following a "material cybersecurity incident" discovered on August 9, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that F5 may have misled investors about the security of its products, the incident's financial impact, and the timeliness of its disclosures, which caused significant drops in share price after revelations in October 2025. Hagens Berman is investigating claims that F5 management knew about the materiality of the breach earlier than disclosed.

feed.title: Öl-Service by Halliburton: The Quiet Backbone Powering the World’s Energy Giants
feed.summary: Halliburton's "Öl-Service" provides integrated oilfield services, ranging from drilling and completion to digital subsurface intelligence, aiming to make hydrocarbon projects more predictable and profitable. The article highlights Halliburton's strengths in scale, integration, digitalization, and technical depth, positioning it as a strategic partner for complex operations despite potential drawbacks like cost and bureaucracy. It emphasizes that choosing Halliburton means investing in an ecosystem designed to reduce operational uncertainty and optimize performance across the entire well lifecycle.

feed.title: Bham Fortune 500 company names new CFO
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corporation has announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31, and Anil Chadha will succeed him. Chadha's appointment follows Turner's retirement, marking a significant executive transition for the Birmingham-based Fortune 500 company. This change will be effective following Turner's departure.

feed.title: Western Union (WU) Target Lifted at Keefe Bruyette in Payments Sector Update
feed.summary: Keefe Bruyette raised its price target on Western Union (WU) to $10 from $9, maintaining a Market Perform rating, as part of a broader update in the consumer finance and payments sector. The company is actively pursuing a digital transformation, expanding its travel money business, and exploring stablecoin technology, including plans to launch a USDPT on Solana in the first half of 2026. This initiative aims to broaden money movement across its network and enhance treasury flexibility.

feed.title: National Storage Affiliates (NSA) Target Trimmed at UBS as REITs Head Into 2026 Reset
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for National Storage Affiliates (NYSE: NSA) to $29 from $30, maintaining a Neutral rating. This adjustment reflects UBS's broader outlook on REITs, which anticipates a 9-11% total return in 2026 driven by improving macro conditions and easing supply pressures. National Storage Affiliates is also expanding through a new joint venture with Investment Real Estate Management, focusing on value-add self-storage opportunities.

feed.title: QXO announces additional $1.8 billion raise for deal war chest
feed.summary: QXO has secured an additional $1.8 billion in funding from Apollo, Temasek, and other investors, bringing its total war chest for acquisitions to $3 billion. The company, founded by Brad Jacobs, aims to disrupt the building products industry and increase its annual revenue from $10 billion to $50 billion within five years. QXO is in late-stage discussions with seven potential acquisition targets, both private and family-owned businesses in the US and Europe, with a deadline to announce a deal by July 15.

feed.title: Waters Corp Announces Presentation at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Waters Corp (WAT) announced its participation in the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 12, 2026. During the presentation, the company discussed its business performance, future outlook, and strategic initiatives, including a proposed transaction with Becton, Dickinson and SpinCo. The presentation materials are available on Waters Corp's website and an SEC 8-K filing provides further details.

feed.title: Why Capital One (COF) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
feed.summary: Capital One (COF) stock fell 6.6% after President Donald Trump announced a plan to implement a one-year, 10% cap on credit card interest rates. This proposal is significantly lower than the average commercial bank interest rate of nearly 21%, causing concerns about the profitability of credit card lenders and their ability to extend credit. Industry groups have voiced opposition, suggesting the cap could reduce credit availability in the market.

feed.title: Sleep Number Corp. Introduces ComfortMode Mattress
feed.summary: Sleep Number Corporation has launched its new ComfortMode mattress, designed to be its most comfortable option at a sub-$1,600 price point, requiring no app or connectivity. This new offering, along with an accompanying adjustable base priced under $3,000, aims to attract a broader consumer base to the Sleep Number brand. The ComfortMode mattress features enhanced comfort layers, firmness adjustability, and temperature balancing, providing a luxurious feel at an accessible price.

feed.title: Scotiabank trims Verizon (VZ) price target as wireless promotions intensify
feed.summary: Scotiabank reduced its price target for Verizon (VZ) from $45 to $43, maintaining a Sector Perform rating. This adjustment was made due to an anticipated increase in promotional intensity within the wireless sector, indicating potential challenges for Verizon's market performance.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems Insider Sold Shares Worth $2,009,189, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) recently sold shares valued at $2,009,189, as reported in a new SEC filing. This transaction comes amidst various other insider sales and company news, including Cadence launching a partner ecosystem and analyst price target adjustments. The company specializes in developing design software for integrated circuits and electronic systems.

feed.title: Miller, Costco SVP sells $1.37 million in COST stock
feed.summary: Russell D. Miller, Senior Executive Vice President at Costco Wholesale, sold 1,500 shares of Costco stock worth $1.37 million on January 9, 2026. Despite the insider selling, Costco's financial health is rated "GREAT" by InvestingPro, and the company has shown strong sales growth in recent reports, leading to positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: UBS Likes Pfizer's MTSR Obesity Deal but Stays Neutral on PFE
feed.summary: UBS initiated coverage on Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) with a Neutral rating and a $25 price target, citing uncertainty around future revenue due to upcoming patent expirations, despite liking the recent MTSR obesity deal. The firm suggests Pfizer needs more strategic moves to address long-term risks. Additionally, Pfizer announced a new AI-focused partnership with Boltz, PBC, to enhance drug discovery and development processes.

feed.title: AbbVie Becomes Latest To License PD-1/VEGF Bispecific In Growing Field
feed.summary: AbbVie has announced a licensing deal with RemeGen for its anti-PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, RC148. This move positions AbbVie in the expanding field of bispecific antibodies targeting both PD-1 and VEGF pathways. The article highlights AbbVie's strategic decision to acquire this asset amidst increasing competition and development in this therapeutic area.

feed.title: Inside Jabil Inc.: The Quiet Giant Powering the World’s Electronics Supply Chain
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. is a behind-the-scenes powerhouse, building and running the hardware backbone for numerous consumer brands across diverse industries like electronics, automotive, healthcare, and cloud computing. The company excels in design, advanced manufacturing, global supply chain orchestration, and lifecycle services, offering deep vertical expertise and a resilient, regionalized manufacturing footprint. Jabil's competitive edge lies in its ability to manage complexity for OEMs, providing integrated platforms that help navigate volatile supply chains and accelerating product cycles.

feed.title: EOG Resources reports $21 million net cash payments for derivatives in Q4
feed.summary: EOG Resources reported net cash payments of $21 million for financial commodity derivatives in Q4 2025, according to its latest SEC filing. The company also provided details on average crude oil ($59.17/barrel WTI) and natural gas ($3.55/MMBtu Henry Hub) prices for the period and disclosed its use of mark-to-market accounting for derivatives and future Brent-linked gas sales. This update follows recent third-quarter earnings that surpassed EPS forecasts and a new board appointment.

feed.title: CBOE Stock Today: January 12 Affin Hwang to Offer VIX Futures
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets has partnered with Affin Hwang Investment Bank to introduce VIX futures to Malaysian investors, aiming to expand access and potentially increase trading volumes and fee revenue for Cboe. CBOE stock is currently trading near a 52-week high, exhibiting strong momentum but showing signs of being overbought. Investors are advised to monitor the company's next earnings call on February 6, 2026, for updates on international client adoption and the impact of this new distribution channel on growth and liquidity.

feed.title: Katherine Ramundo Sells 5,000 Shares of Aptiv PLC
feed.summary: Katherine Ramundo, Executive Vice President of Aptiv Services US LLC, sold 5,000 shares of Aptiv PLC (APTV) on January 8, 2026. This transaction reduces her total holdings to 116,959 shares. Over the past year, Aptiv PLC has seen one insider buy and thirteen insider sells, with the stock currently considered modestly undervalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Invesco (IVZ) Records Rise in Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Invesco (IVZ) reported a 0.7% increase in its assets under management (AUM) to $2.17 trillion, driven by $7.7 billion in net long-term inflows. While the company demonstrates strong liquidity and profitability, its Altman Z-Score indicates potential financial instability, and valuation metrics suggest the stock is trading near historical highs. Investors should consider these mixed signals, along with insider selling and the stock's volatility.

feed.title: Honeywell International (HON): Citigroup Updates Analyst Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Honeywell International (HON) but lowered the target price from $267 to $262, a 1.87% decrease. This latest adjustment follows several other analysts who have also reduced their price targets for HON recently. Despite these adjustments, the average target price from 25 analysts is $233.69, suggesting a 12.03% upside from the current price, and the average brokerage recommendation remains "Outperform."

feed.title: Raymond James initiates Enphase Energy stock coverage with Market Perform rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage of Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Market Perform rating, acknowledging the company's strong market position and high-quality business despite premium pricing. The firm, however, expressed concerns about the solar sector's dependence on external factors like government subsidies and variable financing rates, noting that these factors have recently moved in an unfavorable direction. This report follows significant developments in the broader solar industry, including First Solar's expansion of manufacturing facilities.

feed.title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Receives Market Perform Rating from Raymon
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage on Enphase Energy (ENPH) with a "Market Perform" rating, acknowledging the company's strong market share and gross margins despite a post-COVID sales decline. Enphase faces sector-specific challenges including reliance on government subsidies, fluctuating financing rates, and a restrictive domestic policy environment. The company, a significant player in the solar market with a $4.8 billion market capitalization, exhibits mixed financial signals with strong liquidity but some stress indicated by its Altman Z-Score.

feed.title: EOG Resources reports $21 million net cash payments for derivatives in Q4
feed.summary: EOG Resources reported net cash payments of $21 million in Q4 2025 to settle financial commodity derivative contracts, with no cash receipts from its Brent crude-linked natural gas sales agreement expected to begin in 2027. The company detailed average commodity prices for the quarter and confirmed mark-to-market accounting for its derivatives. This disclosure follows recent positive Q3 2025 earnings results where EOG beat EPS forecasts, leading to reiterated 'Strong Buy' and 'Buy' ratings from Raymond James and UBS, respectively.

feed.title: Citigroup will pay 60 cents a share to investors on Feb. 27
feed.summary: Citigroup's Board of Directors has declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.60 per share, payable on February 27, 2026, to stockholders of record on February 2, 2026. The board also declared dividends for various series of Citigroup's preferred stock. These dividends ensure payments to holders of common and preferred shares are scheduled for late February and mid-February, respectively.

feed.title: VICI Properties (VICI) Target Lowered at Cantor Fitzgerald as 2026 REIT Outlook Improves
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has lowered its price target for VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) to $33 from $35, while maintaining an Overweight rating. Despite trailing the S&P 500 in 2025, the firm anticipates an improved outlook for US equity REITs in 2026 due to a supportive macroeconomic backdrop and increased M&A activity. VICI's stable supply and demand, strong balance sheet, and well-covered dividend, coupled with its triple-net lease model and long-term CPI-linked rent escalators, contribute to its appeal as a consistent dividend payer.

feed.title: Kroger offers discounts for food insecure
feed.summary: Kroger has launched its Verified Savings Program, offering a 20% discount on fresh fruits and vegetables to individuals receiving government assistance like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid. This initiative aims to combat food insecurity by making healthy food more accessible. Eligible customers can enroll online, and the discount will be automatically applied to purchases through January 31.

feed.title: Kroger launches new program offering 20% off fresh produce
feed.summary: Kroger has initiated a new Verified Savings Program, offering a 20% discount on fresh fruits and vegetables. This program targets individuals receiving government assistance such as SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid, aiming to combat food insecurity. Eligible customers can enroll online through their Kroger digital accounts, with the discount automatically applied at checkout for purchases made until January 31st.

feed.title: This Midwest power company has paid dividends since 1946
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5350 per share, payable on February 17, 2026, to shareowners of record as of January 30, 2026. The company has a long history of paying dividends, having done so for 321 consecutive quarters since 1946, and is recognized as a member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index. Alliant Energy provides regulated energy service to approximately 1 million electric and 430,000 natural gas customers across Iowa and Wisconsin.

feed.title: Hormel Foods announces retirement of two senior executives
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation has announced the retirement of two long-serving executives: Mark Morey, vice president of operations for fresh pork, and Paul Peil, vice president of marketing for fresh and ready meats. Both executives have dedicated over 30 years to the company, holding various leadership roles. The company's interim CEO, Jeff Ettinger, expressed gratitude for their contributions, and their successors have not yet been announced.

feed.title: Lululemon Raises Q4 Outlook on Strong Holiday Demand
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica has increased its Q4 2025 revenue and EPS outlook, now expecting figures at the high end of previous guidance due to strong holiday season performance. The company's gross margin, operating expenses, and effective tax rate guidance remain unchanged, suggesting resilient demand despite challenges in the U.S. market. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates LULU as Outperform, noting its financial strength and strategic growth initiatives, but also highlights risks like increased costs and declining gross margins.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE:CRL) announced plans to acquire K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. for approximately $510 million and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million. These acquisitions are expected to strengthen its non-human primate supply chain and enhance biologics testing capabilities. The company also announced leadership changes and reported improving demand trends, with its shares trading near a 52-week high.

feed.title: Revvity expects to exceed Q4 guidance with 6% revenue growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE:RVTY) anticipates exceeding its Q4 2025 revenue guidance, projecting approximately $772 million, marking 6% reported growth and 4% organic growth year-over-year. The company also expects full-year 2025 revenue of about $2.855 billion and adjusted earnings per share above its previous guidance of $4.90-$5.00. Revvity is scheduled to release its full financial results on February 2, 2026, and will host a conference call, with its CEO also presenting at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

feed.title: Regions CFO David Turner to retire, Anil Chadha named successor By Investing.com
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp. announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31, 2026, after 20 years with the bank. Anil Chadha, currently the Controller and head of Corporate Finance, will succeed him. Turner guided the company through significant growth, and Chadha brings extensive experience from previous roles at Ally Financial, Wachovia/Wells Fargo, and Capital One.

feed.title: Pool Corporation announces leadership changes as St. Romain to retire By Investing.com
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (NASDAQ: POOL) announced the retirement of Senior Vice President Kenneth "Kenny" G. St. Romain in 2026 after over 40 years with the company. John B. Watwood has been appointed Executive Vice President to oversee North American swimming pool operations and lead digital and technology initiatives. The company continues to demonstrate strong financial performance, including 15 consecutive years of dividend increases, and analysts consider its stock undervalued.

feed.title: Option Care Health reports Q4 revenue of $1.46-1.47 billion By Investing.com
feed.summary: Option Care Health announced preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, projecting Q4 net revenue between $1.46 billion and $1.47 billion, and full year net revenue of $5.645 billion to $5.655 billion. The company also provided 2026 guidance, expecting net revenue between $5.8 billion and $6.0 billion, and expanded its share repurchase program authorization from $500 million to $1.0 billion. Analysts, despite varying price targets, generally view the company favorably, noting its strong market position and aggressive share buybacks.

feed.title: MKS Inc. Unveils Photonics Solutions to Advance AI, Quantum, and Biotech at Photonics West 2026
feed.summary: MKS Inc. (NASDAQ: MKSI) will showcase its latest photonics solutions for AI, quantum computing, biophotonics, security, and advanced manufacturing at Photonics West 2026. The company will feature products like Newport HybrYX stages, Spectra-Physics Talon Ace lasers, and InSight X3+ tunable lasers, highlighting its "Surround the Workpiece" strategy for end-to-end solutions. The announcement comes as MKS stock trades above its 200-day moving average, despite no new revenue or guidance figures being provided.

feed.title: Invesco reports $2.17 trillion in assets under management for December By Investing.com
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $2,169.9 billion as of December 31, 2025, a 0.7% increase from the previous month. The company saw net long-term inflows of $7.7 billion and its stock price surged 82.36% over the past year, with a strong dividend yield. Recent strategic moves include the conversion of the Invesco QQQ fund to an open-end ETF and a partnership with LGT Capital Partners.

feed.title: NOV Stock: Why Holding for Now Is the Right Move, Not Buying
feed.summary: NOV Inc. (NOV) has seen its shares outperform the broader oil and energy market, driven by strategic positioning in long-term energy shifts, a record backlog, and strong free cash flow generation. However, challenges include a delayed convergence of growth cycles, a sharp bottom-line contraction, and continued difficulties in the offshore wind market. Given these mixed factors, investors are advised to hold rather than buy, awaiting a more favorable entry point.

feed.title: Regions Financial Announces David Turner to Retire, Anil Chadha to Serve as Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp. announced that Chief Financial Officer David Turner will retire on March 31, 2026, after a nearly 40-year career. Anil Chadha, currently Controller and head of Corporate Finance, will succeed Turner as CFO. The transition is planned to be smooth, with both working together until March, ensuring continuity in the company’s financial leadership.
